title: Record a ZDR privacy posture contract
prompt: Create reports/zdr-privacy-contract.md with sections for Default telemetry, Opt-in analytics, /status privacy gate, and Local evidence only.

fixtureActions.content:
# ZDR Privacy Contract

## Default telemetry
product telemetry is OFF by default (ZDR-friendly)

## Opt-in analytics
set telemetry = true in config.toml only when usage analytics are wanted

## /status privacy gate
/status and /context show Privacy / ZDR posture without secrets

## Local evidence only
keep secrets out of chat/logs; redacted bench evidence before sharing
